scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const from=path.join('src','student-cards','assets','atretu-logo.png');const to=path.join('dist','student-cards','assets','atretu-logo.png');if(!fs.existsSync(from)){throw new Error('Missing official ATRETU logo asset: '+from);}fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(to),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(from,to);"
scripts.test: npm run check:metadata && tsx src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts && tsx src/auth/timing-safe-token.spec.ts && tsx src/base-records/base-records.service.spec.ts && tsx src/students/cpf.spec.ts && tsx src/students/lifecycle.spec.ts && tsx src/student-cards/card-number.spec.ts && tsx src/student-cards/student-card-pdf.service.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/money.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/due-date.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/bank-slip-status.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/sicredi-config.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/sicredi-client.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/bank-slips.service.spec.ts && tsx src/finance/invoices.service.spec.ts && tsx src/security/origin-check.middleware.spec.ts && tsx src/security/rate-limit.service.spec.ts && tsx src/bus-assignments/capacity.spec.ts && tsx src/documents/document-file.spec.ts && tsx src/pre-registrations/pre-registration-public.dto.spec.ts && tsx src/config/app-config.module.spec.ts && tsx src/config/env.spec.ts
